notableEvents.label: Marcelo Mayer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcelo Mayer grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Christian Walker. Trevor Story out at 2nd. Marcelo Mayer out at 1st.
